seo.title: MEIJIA DENTAL | Digital Dental Laboratory in Shenzhen
seo.description: MEIJIA DENTAL is a Shenzhen dental laboratory providing all-ceramic, PFM, implant, removable and orthodontic restoration solutions for dental clinics and laboratories.

hero.image_alt: Modern dental laboratory with CAD/CAM equipment and ceramic restorations

carousel_images.image_alt: MEIJIA DENTAL production floor with CAD/CAM equipment and technicians in Shenzhen
carousel_images.title: Shenzhen capacity built for stable case turnaround.
carousel_images.subtitle: From digital design to milling, finishing and inspection, our Baoan team keeps multi-category cases moving through a clear production workflow.

carousel_images.image_alt: Dental technician inspecting all-ceramic restorations in the laboratory
carousel_images.title: Natural restorations shaped by digital accuracy and hand review.
carousel_images.subtitle: Every crown, bridge and appliance is checked for morphology, contacts, occlusion, shade communication and final polish before delivery.

hero.title: Reliable digital restorations for clinics and labs worldwide.
hero.subtitle: MEIJIA DENTAL combines Hong Kong inspired prosthodontic standards with Shenzhen manufacturing efficiency to deliver precise, consistent and cost-effective dental restorations.

service_overview.title: Precision fit
service_overview.description: Designed for predictable seating, occlusion and shade communication.

service_overview.title: Stable turnaround
service_overview.description: Case intake, production tracking and final inspection are handled in one workflow.

service_overview.title: Clinic ready support
service_overview.description: English communication for digital files, prescriptions and remake prevention.

about.title: Built from craft experience, upgraded for digital dentistry.
paragraphs: MEIJIA DENTAL originated in Hong Kong and moved its production base to Shenzhen in 2005. The company has kept a practical promise from day one: make high-quality restorations accessible through disciplined technique, responsive service and fair value.

Our team supports dental clinics, distributors and partner laboratories with fixed restorations, implant solutions, removable prosthetics and orthodontic appliances. Every case is reviewed around fit, morphology, contact, occlusion, shade and finishing before dispatch.

facts.title: Production Focus
facts.description: All-ceramic, PFM, implant, removable and orthodontic appliances

facts.title: Service Model
facts.description: Digital case files, conventional impressions and online order support

facts.title: Quality Mindset
facts.description: Technician-led checks from preparation review to final polish

product_section.title: Restoration solutions for everyday clinical demand.
product_section.description: A focused product portfolio covers the categories from the original company page while presenting them clearly for English-speaking buyers.

capabilities.title: Digital tools with technician judgment behind every step.
capabilities.description: Technology improves speed and repeatability, but restoration quality still depends on careful human review. MEIJIA DENTAL pairs scan-based design and milling workflows with experienced ceramic, metal and denture technicians.

items.title: CAD design
items.description: Margin review, anatomy, contacts and occlusion planning.

items.title: CAM production
items.description: Milling, sintering, pressing, casting and framework finishing.

items.title: Layering & staining
items.description: Shade communication, surface texture and natural characterization.

items.title: Final inspection
items.description: Fit, contact, occlusion, polish, labeling and packaging control.

workflow.title: A clear case path from prescription to delivery.

steps.title: Case submission
steps.description: Send STL files, scans, photos, shade notes or conventional impressions with a prescription.

steps.title: Design confirmation
steps.description: Technicians review preparation, material choice, implant system details and timeline requirements.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Cases move through digital design, framework production, ceramic or acrylic finishing and internal checks.

steps.title: Delivery support
steps.description: Finished restorations are packed with case information, and follow-up feedback is used to improve repeat cases.

quality.title: Consistent restorations, practical communication and responsible after-service.
items: Material recommendations matched to the indication and budget.
Photo-based shade support for esthetic anterior cases.
Traceable case handling for online and offline orders.
Remake prevention through prescription and preparation review.

contact.title: Start with a case file, product question or sample order.
contact.description: Tell us the restoration type, material, shade, implant system if applicable, expected delivery date and any clinic-specific preferences. Our team will confirm the next step in English.
contact.address: 4F, A3 Building, Southern Pearl Technology Park, Yingtai Industrial Zone, Dalang, Longhua, Shenzhen, China
